div.p: Client State, Queued Commands & Watch Registry

ol.li:
EXEC → checks watched_keys version
If modified: txn_aborted = 1, return nil
If OK: execute all queued commands

ul.li: Stores txn_state, queued commands array, watched keys array
Full RESP string + parsed args + command pointer
Key name + version for conflict detection
Maps keys → list of watching clients
O(1) lookup when key is modified
